name: Motorcar Parts of America Inc.R
summary: Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. manufactures, remanufactures, and distributes automotive parts including alternators, starters, brake calipers, brake master cylinders, wheel cylinders, brake power boosters, rotors, drums and turbochargers utilized in imported and domestic passenger vehicles, light trucks and heavy-duty applications. The company serves automotive retail outlets and warehouse distributors in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. Its headquarters are located in California, USA.
